basic_details.job_title: WBSETCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Chief Medical Officer, Special Officer Posts
basic_details.organization_name: West Bengal State Electricity Transmission Co. Ltd. (WBSETCL)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.age_details: Max 66 years for Chief Medical Officer, Between 60 to 62 years for Special Officer (Security).
age_limit.details: Chief Medical Officer: Maximum 66 years. Special Officer (Security): Between 60 to 62 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree for Chief Medical Officer, and experience as Dy. Superintendent of Police for Special Officer (Security).
qualification.details: Chief Medical Officer: M.B.B.S. Degree from a recognized University approved by MCI. At least 20 years Post Qualification experience in any Govt./ Semi Govt. Organization/ State PSU/ Central PSU. Must have worked in the rank of Chief Medical Officer or above in the organization during his or her entire Service Period. Special Officer (Security): Retired Officer in the rank of Dy. Superintendent of Police who has worked in different capacities as OCs/ ICs/CIs/ Zonal DSPs/ SDPOs in their career.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 72,000/- per month for Chief Medical Officer, Rs. 50,000/- per month for Special Officer (Security)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WBSETCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.wbsetcl.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the WBSETCL recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form along with all required documents is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in the WBSETCL recruitment?
faq.answer: WBSETCL is recruiting for two posts: Chief Medical Officer and Special Officer (Security).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Chief Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Chief Medical Officer position, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized university and have at least 20 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Special Officer (Security) post?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Special Officer (Security) post is between 60 to 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Chief Medical Officer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Chief Medical Officer post will receive a salary of Rs. 72,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for these WBSETCL posts?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. You can download the application form from the official website and send the filled form with necessary documents to the given address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for both posts will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies, with one post for Chief Medical Officer and one post for Special Officer (Security).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application format can be downloaded from the official website of WBSETCL, which is www.wbsetcl.in, starting from 10th June 2026.
